subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Upon thee be the glory of this mighty Announcement, through which God hath fulfilled His promise and manifested His sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابرهیم علیک بهاء هذا النبا العظیم الذی به انجز الله وعده و اظهر سلطانه و
